rigready_vectorizer_gui.title: RigReady Vectorizer
rigready_vectorizer_gui.header_desc: Convert layered artwork into rig-ready vector output.
rigready_vectorizer_gui.tooltip_speckle: Higher values remove small speckles and simplify shapes.
rigready_vectorizer_gui.tooltip_color: Higher values preserve more color variations.
rigready_vectorizer_gui.tooltip_corner: Higher values create smoother curves with fewer corners.
rigready_vectorizer_gui.select_layers: Select at least one layer before starting.
rigready_vectorizer_gui.ae_import_complete: After Effects import script created successfully.
rigready_vectorizer_gui.ae_import_error: Failed to create After Effects import script.

guide.title: Vectorizer Guide
guide.smart_object_desc: Smart objects may need conversion before vector export. Use the helper script if needed.
guide.script_desc: Save the JSX helper file for Photoshop workflows.
guide.tip_desc: Start with default values, then increase detail only when the output loses important shapes.
